evidence_quotes.quote: Games shouldn't need a constant internet connection for singleplayer modes.
If you buy something, you should own it and not a 'license'.
Game producers also need to include an end of service plan and therefore ways users can still play the game online by hosting themselves.
MasterCard & Visa give too many stipulations and have too much control on what people use their money for.

they can lock down the device if they deem the use of that device not in line with what they want us to use it for and take our access to our media like Movies and Tv Shows, Music, Games, Books we've paid for.
Even buying physical media or tech doesn't mean you own it now, Physical Media like movies and games often now dont come with the full media on it or in some cases none of it
Ownership is dying, and we all need to take a stand for the future, we are on a slippery slope and we need to fix it.
we have to agree to their terms in order to use what we have bought
Stop Online Censorship & Mass Surveillance: Stands for itself

paragraphs.text: 1 - Stop Killing Games: Games shouldn't need a constant internet connection for singleplayer modes. Companies shouldn't have the power to delete games consumers purchased. If you buy something, you should own it and not a "license". Game producers also need to include an end of service plan and therefore ways users can still play the game online by hosting themselves. Refer to the initiative. 2 - Stop Payment Processor Monopoly: MasterCard & Visa give too many stipulations and have too much control on what people use their money for. (i. e. taking games off Steam or pressuring various other companies by declining them the possibility to use the most common online payment method) 3 - The Deletion of Ownership: Digital Payments of fx Movies, Games, Music and Digital books are being sold more and more as a licence without any way to outright buy and own that copy of the product which means our rights to own the things we buy is being taken from us everyday, we've already seen corporations say you will own nothing and be happy, even the Operating system on most of our computers aka Windows or Mac OS, Android and so on, are not a choice or something we can own and take control of, our computers are filled with ads, offline accounts are going away and we have to agree to their terms in order to use what we have bought, which means give over our data, personal information and everything we do on the device, they can lock down the device if they deem the use of that device not in line with what they want us to use it for and take our access to our media like Movies and Tv Shows, Music, Games, Books we've paid for, we have already seen this for years now fx: Sony has taken down movies and shows people paid for with no warning or means to back up their digital media, Nintendo, Microsoft and Sony have been able to outright ban a device like their gaming consoles for years and rendering the device unable to function properly and unable to be resold, Nintendo has been banning their newest consoles for a while now over used games or people trying to use their devices in ways that Nintendo didn't intend. Even buying physical media or tech doesn't mean you own it now, Physical Media like movies and games often now dont come with the full media on it or in some cases none of it, which means people without internet or people that simply want it physically can no longer be certain or in general can't get the product they paid for, and if that is for a games console and it's banned you will no longer be able to get the game you paid for both the media and the physical products are now expensive paperweights. Ownership is dying, and we all need to take a stand for the future, we are on a slippery slope and we need to fix it. This is has been making it ways to cars, tractors and other products, corporations are way ahead and slowly taking control of how we live our lives, and it's only getting worse, we never know where all this is gonna end if we dont do something, this can end up going far beyond what we can currently imagine, and it's already not good. 4 - Stop Online Censorship & Mass Surveillance: Stands for itself
